items.title: Pinterest shares are sinking. The AI risk is now, one analyst says.
items.description: Pinterest shares are tumbling after a disappointing revenue outlook and quarterly growth, as some analysts can’t shake their AI disruption concerns.

items.title: ‘My mom was very upset’: My stepsister changed the address on our mother’s bank account. Can she be trusted as executor?
items.description: “It’s things like this that make me wonder what else she might be doing.”

items.title: My elderly mother has dementia. My sister sold her house and has hidden the proceeds. What can we do?
items.description: “My sister is planning to move out of state and feels it is her right to control the money.”
